revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=墨俣神社| 所在地=岐阜県大垣市墨俣町墨俣836| 位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|21|50.45|N|136|41|2.61|E|scale:20000}}| 祭神=墨俣大神| 社格=式内社（小）、郷社| 例祭=| 創建=不明| 画像=[[File:Sunomata jinja2008-1.jpg|center|250px]]| }}
'''墨俣神社'''（すのまたじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]（旧[[安八郡]][[墨俣町]]）にある[[神社]]。[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の墨俣神社である。
[[大垣市立墨俣小学校]]の北にある。
== 沿革・概略 == *創建時期は不明。祭神の「墨俣大神」はどの神に該当するかは不明である。[[延喜式神名帳]]にも祭神は「墨俣大神」とされている。 *元の位置は現在地より南、墨俣町上宿または墨俣町下宿（[[美濃路]]設置前の[[墨俣宿]]）であった。[[1717年]]（[[享保]]2年）、南宮大社の調査で延喜式神名帳の墨俣神社であることが判明する。 *[[明治時代]]の[[犀川 (岐阜県)|犀川]]の改修のため、現在地に移転する。
== 交通機関 == *[[名阪近鉄バス]]岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[大垣駅前バスのりば]]（[[大垣駅]]南）2番のりば「[[岐阜聖徳学園大学]]」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *[[岐阜乗合自動車|岐阜バス]]おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[JR岐阜駅バスターミナル]]（[[岐阜駅]]北）6番のりば「W65 墨俣」行き **[[名鉄岐阜のりば]]（[[名鉄岐阜駅]]西）1番のりば「W65 墨俣」行き
{{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]]

{{神社| 名称=墨俣神社| 所在地=[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]墨俣町墨俣836| 位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|21|50.45|N|136|41|2.61|E|scale:20000}}| 祭神=墨俣大神| 社格=[[式内社]]（小）
旧[[郷社]]| 例祭=[[10月10日]]| 創建=不詳| 本殿=[[流造]]| 画像=[[File:Sunomata jinja2008-1.jpg|center|250px]]| }} '''墨俣神社'''（すのまたじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]（旧[[安八郡]][[墨俣町]]）にある[[神社]]。[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の墨俣神社である。 [[大垣市立墨俣小学校]]の北にある。 == 沿革・概略 == *創建時期は不明。祭神の「墨俣大神」はどの神に該当するかは不明である。[[延喜式神名帳]]にも祭神は「墨俣大神」とされている。 *元の位置は現在地より南、墨俣町上宿または墨俣町下宿（[[美濃路]]設置前の[[墨俣宿]]）であった。[[1717年]]（[[享保]]2年）、南宮大社の調査で延喜式神名帳の墨俣神社であることが判明する。 *[[明治時代]]の[[犀川 (岐阜県)|犀川]]の改修のため、現在地に移転する。 == 交通機関 == *[[名阪近鉄バス]]岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[大垣駅前バスのりば]]（[[大垣駅]]南）2番のりば「[[岐阜聖徳学園大学]]」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *[[岐阜乗合自動車|岐阜バス]]おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[JR岐阜駅バスターミナル]]（[[岐阜駅]]北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **[[名鉄岐阜のりば]]（[[名鉄岐阜駅]]西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]]

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{Infobox religious building | name = Sunomata Shrine | native_name = 墨俣神社 | image = Sunomata jinja2008-1.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Sunomata Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.363881|136.684046}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{Infobox religious building | name = Sunomata Shrine | native_name = 墨俣神社 | image = Sunomata jinja2008-1.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Sunomata Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.363881|136.684046}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

revision.comment: 11 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{出典の明記| date = 2024年6月}} {{神社 | 名称=墨俣神社 | 画像=[[File:Sunomata jinja2008-1.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿 | 所在地=[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]墨俣町墨俣836 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=墨俣大神 | 社格=[[式内社]]（小）
旧[[郷社]] | 例祭=[[10月10日]] | 創建=不詳 | 本殿=[[流造]] | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=墨俣神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''墨俣神社'''（すのまたじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]（旧[[安八郡]][[墨俣町]]）にある[[神社]]。[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の墨俣神社である。 [[大垣市立墨俣小学校]]の北にある。 == 沿革・概略 == *創建時期は不明。祭神の「墨俣大神」はどの神に該当するかは不明である。[[延喜式神名帳]]にも祭神は「墨俣大神」とされている。 *元の位置は現在地より南、墨俣町上宿または墨俣町下宿（[[美濃路]]設置前の[[墨俣宿]]）であった。[[1717年]]（[[享保]]2年）、南宮大社の調査で延喜式神名帳の墨俣神社であることが判明する。 *[[明治時代]]の[[犀川 (岐阜県)|犀川]]の改修のため、現在地に移転する。 == 交通機関 == *[[名阪近鉄バス]]岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[大垣駅前バスのりば]]（[[大垣駅]]南）2番のりば「[[岐阜聖徳学園大学]]」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *[[岐阜乗合自動車|岐阜バス]]おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[JR岐阜駅バスターミナル]]（[[岐阜駅]]北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **[[名鉄岐阜のりば]]（[[名鉄岐阜駅]]西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[墨俣神社]] to [[Sunomata Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Merging Japanese Wikipedia import with English content
revision.text:
{{出典の明記| date = 2024年6月}} {{神社 | 名称=墨俣神社 | 画像=[[File:Sunomata jinja2008-1.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿 | 所在地=[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]墨俣町墨俣836 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=墨俣大神 | 社格=[[式内社]]（小）
旧[[郷社]] | 例祭=[[10月10日]] | 創建=不詳 | 本殿=[[流造]] | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=墨俣神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''墨俣神社'''（すのまたじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]（旧[[安八郡]][[墨俣町]]）にある[[神社]]。[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の墨俣神社である。 [[大垣市立墨俣小学校]]の北にある。 == 沿革・概略 == *創建時期は不明。祭神の「墨俣大神」はどの神に該当するかは不明である。[[延喜式神名帳]]にも祭神は「墨俣大神」とされている。 *元の位置は現在地より南、墨俣町上宿または墨俣町下宿（[[美濃路]]設置前の[[墨俣宿]]）であった。[[1717年]]（[[享保]]2年）、南宮大社の調査で延喜式神名帳の墨俣神社であることが判明する。 *[[明治時代]]の[[犀川 (岐阜県)|犀川]]の改修のため、現在地に移転する。 == 交通機関 == *[[名阪近鉄バス]]岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[大垣駅前バスのりば]]（[[大垣駅]]南）2番のりば「[[岐阜聖徳学園大学]]」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *[[岐阜乗合自動車|岐阜バス]]おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[JR岐阜駅バスターミナル]]（[[岐阜駅]]北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **[[名鉄岐阜のりば]]（[[名鉄岐阜駅]]西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]]

== {{出典の明記| date = 2024年6月}} {{神社 | 名称=墨俣神社 | 画像=[[File:Sunomata jinja2008-1.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿 | 所在地=[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]墨俣町墨俣836 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=墨俣大神 | 社格=[[式内社]]（小）
旧[[郷社]] | 例祭=[[10月10日]] | 創建=不詳 | 本殿=[[流造]] | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=墨俣神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''墨俣神社'''（すのまたじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]（旧[[安八郡]][[墨俣町]]）にある[[神社]]。[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の墨俣神社である。 [[大垣市立墨俣小学校]]の北にある。 == 沿革・概略 == *創建時期は不明。祭神の「墨俣大神」はどの神に該当するかは不明である。[[延喜式神名帳]]にも祭神は「墨俣大神」とされている。 *元の位置は現在地より南、墨俣町上宿または墨俣町下宿（[[美濃路]]設置前の[[墨俣宿]]）であった。[[1717年]]（[[享保]]2年）、南宮大社の調査で延喜式神名帳の墨俣神社であることが判明する。 *[[明治時代]]の[[犀川 (岐阜県)|犀川]]の改修のため、現在地に移転する。 == 交通機関 == *[[名阪近鉄バス]]岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[大垣駅前バスのりば]]（[[大垣駅]]南）2番のりば「[[岐阜聖徳学園大学]]」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *[[岐阜乗合自動車|岐阜バス]]おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[JR岐阜駅バスターミナル]]（[[岐阜駅]]北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **[[名鉄岐阜のりば]]（[[名鉄岐阜駅]]西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] ==End Japanese==

[[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|墨俣神社|version=107307309|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{出典の明記| date = 2024年6月}} {{神社 | 名称=墨俣神社 | 画像=[[File:Sunomata jinja2008-1.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿 | 所在地=[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]墨俣町墨俣836 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=墨俣大神 | 社格=[[式内社]]（小）
旧[[郷社]] | 例祭=[[10月10日]] | 創建=不詳 | 本殿=[[流造]] | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=墨俣神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''墨俣神社'''（すのまたじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]（旧[[安八郡]][[墨俣町]]）にある[[神社]]。[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の墨俣神社である。 [[大垣市立墨俣小学校]]の北にある。 == 沿革・概略 == *創建時期は不明。祭神の「墨俣大神」はどの神に該当するかは不明である。[[延喜式神名帳]]にも祭神は「墨俣大神」とされている。 *元の位置は現在地より南、墨俣町上宿または墨俣町下宿（[[美濃路]]設置前の[[墨俣宿]]）であった。[[1717年]]（[[享保]]2年）、南宮大社の調査で延喜式神名帳の墨俣神社であることが判明する。 *[[明治時代]]の[[犀川 (岐阜県)|犀川]]の改修のため、現在地に移転する。 == 交通機関 == *[[名阪近鉄バス]]岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[大垣駅前バスのりば]]（[[大垣駅]]南）2番のりば「[[岐阜聖徳学園大学]]」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *[[岐阜乗合自動車|岐阜バス]]おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[JR岐阜駅バスターミナル]]（[[岐阜駅]]北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **[[名鉄岐阜のりば]]（[[名鉄岐阜駅]]西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]]

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Shrine'''|墨俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

name in kana (P1814) == * すのまたじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4200005004781 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県大垣市墨俣町墨俣836', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Sunomata-jinja}} [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=墨俣神社 | 画像=[[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (1).jpg|280px]] | 所在地={{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|大垣市|Q384926}}{{jalink|墨俣町|Q7640962}}墨俣264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=墨俣大神 | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}（小）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} | 例祭={{jalink|10月10日|Q2921}} | 創建=不詳 | 本殿={{jalink|流造|Q210684}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=墨俣神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''墨俣神社'''（すのまたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|大垣市|Q384926}}{{jalink|墨俣町|Q7640962}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}。{{jalink|大垣市立墨俣小学校|Q11433783}}の北にある。 === 祭神 === * 墨俣大神（すみまたのおおかみ）[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 墨俣神社] 岐阜県神社庁 === 歴史 === === 創建 === 創建時期は不詳墨俣町史編纂委員会『墨俣町史』墨俣町、1956年、pp.414-416。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}にも祭神は「墨俣大神」とされているが、どの神に該当するかは不明である。天慶・天徳年間（938年-961年）の編纂とされる『美濃国神名帳』には「従五位下墨俣明神」とある。 元は墨俣の渡船場の南にあった。享保2年（1717年）、{{jalink|南宮大社|Q704967}}の調査によって延喜式神名帳の墨俣神社と同定された。 === 近代・現代 === 1873年（明治6年）、{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534}}によって郷社に列せられた。 {{jalink|明治時代}}には洪水被害を減らすために{{jalink|犀川 (岐阜県)|Q7399814|犀川}}改修工事が着工され、1935年（昭和10年）に現在地に移転した[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ Histroy] すのまた旅。 === 境内 === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|常夜燈台座]] * 社殿 * 秋葉神社 - 境内社。沿革は不詳。 * 御鍬神社 - 境内社。沿革は不詳。 * 神明神社 - 境内社。1907年（明治40年）3月27日には{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|神饌幣帛料共進神社}}に指定された。 * 常夜燈台座 - 渡船場（墨俣渡）にあったと伝わる{{jalink|常夜燈}}の基台部分が境内に置かれている米山清一『墨俣歴史探訪』米山清一、1992年、p.51。通称は「ゴトウサン」。文化12年（1815年）頃に常夜燈が完成したが、1891年（明治24年）10月28日の{{jalink|濃尾地震|Q2351002}}によって火袋と棹部が壊れた。まず墨俣神社大鳥居の脇に移設されたが、1933年（昭和8年）には墨俣神社の移転に合わせて現在地に移設された。 Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|境内 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|名阪近鉄バス|Q11415818}}岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **{{jalink|大垣駅前バスのりば|Q11433817}}（{{jalink|大垣駅|Q871579}}南）2番のりば「{{jalink|岐阜聖徳学園大学|Q5560125}}」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *{{jalink|岐阜乗合自動車|Q5560101|岐阜バス}}おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **{{jalink|JR岐阜駅バスターミナル|Q11226229}}（{{jalink|岐阜駅|Q1144885}}北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **{{jalink|名鉄岐阜のりば|Q11415771}}（{{jalink|名鉄岐阜駅|Q1109902}}西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 墨俣神社] 岐阜県神社庁 {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]]

境内社。沿革は不詳。 * 御鍬神社 - 境内社。沿革は不詳。 * 神明神社 - 境内社。1907年（明治40年）3月27日には{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|神饌幣帛料共進神社}}に指定された。 * 常夜燈台座 - 渡船場（墨俣渡）にあったと伝わる{{jalink|常夜燈}}の基台部分が境内に置かれている米山清一『墨俣歴史探訪』米山清一、1992年、p.51。通称は「ゴトウサン」。文化12年（1815年）頃に常夜燈が完成したが、1891年（明治24年）10月28日の{{jalink|濃尾地震|Q2351002}}によって火袋と棹部が壊れた。まず墨俣神社大鳥居の脇に移設されたが、1933年（昭和8年）には墨俣神社の移転に合わせて現在地に移設された。 Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|境内 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|名阪近鉄バス|Q11415818}}岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **{{jalink|大垣駅前バスのりば|Q11433817}}（{{jalink|大垣駅|Q871579}}南）2番のりば「{{jalink|岐阜聖徳学園大学|Q5560125}}」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *{{jalink|岐阜乗合自動車|Q5560101|岐阜バス}}おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **{{jalink|JR岐阜駅バスターミナル|Q11226229}}（{{jalink|岐阜駅|Q1144885}}北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **{{jalink|名鉄岐阜のりば|Q11415771}}（{{jalink|名鉄岐阜駅|Q1109902}}西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 墨俣神社] 岐阜県神社庁 {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

境内社。沿革は不詳。 * 御鍬神社 - 境内社。沿革は不詳。 * 神明神社 - 境内社。1907年（明治40年）3月27日には{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|神饌幣帛料共進神社}}に指定された。 * 常夜燈台座 - 渡船場（墨俣渡）にあったと伝わる{{jalink|常夜燈}}の基台部分が境内に置かれている米山清一『墨俣歴史探訪』米山清一、1992年、p.51。通称は「ゴトウサン」。文化12年（1815年）頃に常夜燈が完成したが、1891年（明治24年）10月28日の{{jalink|濃尾地震|Q2351002}}によって火袋と棹部が壊れた。まず墨俣神社大鳥居の脇に移設されたが、1933年（昭和8年）には墨俣神社の移転に合わせて現在地に移設された。 Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|境内 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|名阪近鉄バス|Q11415818}}岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **{{jalink|大垣駅前バスのりば|Q11433817}}（{{jalink|大垣駅|Q871579}}南）2番のりば「{{jalink|岐阜聖徳学園大学|Q5560125}}」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *{{jalink|岐阜乗合自動車|Q5560101|岐阜バス}}おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **{{jalink|JR岐阜駅バスターミナル|Q11226229}}（{{jalink|岐阜駅|Q1144885}}北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **{{jalink|名鉄岐阜のりば|Q11415771}}（{{jalink|名鉄岐阜駅|Q1109902}}西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 墨俣神社] 岐阜県神社庁 {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

境内社。沿革は不詳。 * 御鍬神社 - 境内社。沿革は不詳。 * 神明神社 - 境内社。1907年（明治40年）3月27日には{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|神饌幣帛料共進神社}}に指定された。 * 常夜燈台座 - 渡船場（墨俣渡）にあったと伝わる{{jalink|常夜燈}}の基台部分が境内に置かれている米山清一『墨俣歴史探訪』米山清一、1992年、p.51。通称は「ゴトウサン」。文化12年（1815年）頃に常夜燈が完成したが、1891年（明治24年）10月28日の{{jalink|濃尾地震|Q2351002}}によって火袋と棹部が壊れた。まず墨俣神社大鳥居の脇に移設されたが、1933年（昭和8年）には墨俣神社の移転に合わせて現在地に移設された。 Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|境内 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|名阪近鉄バス|Q11415818}}岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **{{jalink|大垣駅前バスのりば|Q11433817}}（{{jalink|大垣駅|Q871579}}南）2番のりば「{{jalink|岐阜聖徳学園大学|Q5560125}}」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *{{jalink|岐阜乗合自動車|Q5560101|岐阜バス}}おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **{{jalink|JR岐阜駅バスターミナル|Q11226229}}（{{jalink|岐阜駅|Q1144885}}北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **{{jalink|名鉄岐阜のりば|Q11415771}}（{{jalink|名鉄岐阜駅|Q1109902}}西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 墨俣神社] 岐阜県神社庁 {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

境内社。沿革は不詳。 * 御鍬神社 - 境内社。沿革は不詳。 * 神明神社 - 境内社。1907年（明治40年）3月27日には{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|神饌幣帛料共進神社}}に指定された。 * 常夜燈台座 - 渡船場（墨俣渡）にあったと伝わる{{jalink|常夜燈}}の基台部分が境内に置かれている米山清一『墨俣歴史探訪』米山清一、1992年、p.51。通称は「ゴトウサン」。文化12年（1815年）頃に常夜燈が完成したが、1891年（明治24年）10月28日の{{jalink|濃尾地震|Q2351002}}によって火袋と棹部が壊れた。まず墨俣神社大鳥居の脇に移設されたが、1933年（昭和8年）には墨俣神社の移転に合わせて現在地に移設された。 Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|境内 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|名阪近鉄バス|Q11415818}}岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **{{jalink|大垣駅前バスのりば|Q11433817}}（{{jalink|大垣駅|Q871579}}南）2番のりば「{{jalink|岐阜聖徳学園大学|Q5560125}}」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *{{jalink|岐阜乗合自動車|Q5560101|岐阜バス}}おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **{{jalink|JR岐阜駅バスターミナル|Q11226229}}（{{jalink|岐阜駅|Q1144885}}北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **{{jalink|名鉄岐阜のりば|Q11415771}}（{{jalink|名鉄岐阜駅|Q1109902}}西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 墨俣神社] 岐阜県神社庁 {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

境内社。沿革は不詳。 * 御鍬神社 - 境内社。沿革は不詳。 * 神明神社 - 境内社。1907年（明治40年）3月27日には{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|神饌幣帛料共進神社}}に指定された。 * 常夜燈台座 - 渡船場（墨俣渡）にあったと伝わる{{jalink|常夜燈}}の基台部分が境内に置かれている米山清一『墨俣歴史探訪』米山清一、1992年、p.51。通称は「ゴトウサン」。文化12年（1815年）頃に常夜燈が完成したが、1891年（明治24年）10月28日の{{jalink|濃尾地震|Q2351002}}によって火袋と棹部が壊れた。まず墨俣神社大鳥居の脇に移設されたが、1933年（昭和8年）には墨俣神社の移転に合わせて現在地に移設された。 Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|境内 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|名阪近鉄バス|Q11415818}}岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **{{jalink|大垣駅前バスのりば|Q11433817}}（{{jalink|大垣駅|Q871579}}南）2番のりば「{{jalink|岐阜聖徳学園大学|Q5560125}}」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *{{jalink|岐阜乗合自動車|Q5560101|岐阜バス}}おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **{{jalink|JR岐阜駅バスターミナル|Q11226229}}（{{jalink|岐阜駅|Q1144885}}北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **{{jalink|名鉄岐阜のりば|Q11415771}}（{{jalink|名鉄岐阜駅|Q1109902}}西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 墨俣神社] 岐阜県神社庁 {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

category|Category:Sunomata-jinja}} [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Sunomata Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (1).jpg|280px]] | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}{{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}Sunomata 264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Sunomata Ōkami | 社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (small)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} | 例祭={{jalink|October 10|Q2921}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿={{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Sunomata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Sunomata Shrine''' (すのまたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}, {{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha|Q11064932|Shikinaisha}}. It is north of {{jalink|Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School|Q11433783}}. === Enshrined deity === * Sunomata Ōkami[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association === History === === Founding === Founding period is unknownSunomata Town History Compilation Committee, 'History of Sunomata Town,' Sunomata Town, 1956, pp.414-416. In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}, the enshrined deity is also "Sunomata Ōkami," but which deity this refers to is unclear. In the 'Mino no Kuni Jinmyōchō,' said to have been compiled in Tenkei/Tentoku years (938-961), it appears as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Sunomata Myōjin". Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{jalink|Nangū Taisha|Q704967}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534}}. In the {{jalink|Meiji period}}, river improvement work on the {{jalink|Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|Saigawa}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{jalink|jōyatō|Q11674315|all-night lantern}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{jalink|Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817}} (south of {{jalink|Ōgaki Station|Q871579}}), platform 2, bound for "{{jalink|Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Gifu Bus|Q5560101|Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229}} (north of {{jalink|Gifu Station|Q1144885}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771}} (west of {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

category|Category:Sunomata-jinja}} [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Sunomata Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (1).jpg|280px]] | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}{{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}Sunomata 264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Sunomata Ōkami | 社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (small)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} | 例祭={{jalink|October 10|Q2921}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿={{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Sunomata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Sunomata Shrine''' (すのまたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}, {{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha|Q11064932|Shikinaisha}}. It is north of {{jalink|Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School|Q11433783}}. === Enshrined deity === * Sunomata Ōkami[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association === History === === Founding === Founding period is unknownSunomata Town History Compilation Committee, 'History of Sunomata Town,' Sunomata Town, 1956, pp.414-416. In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}, the enshrined deity is also "Sunomata Ōkami," but which deity this refers to is unclear. In the 'Mino no Kuni Jinmyōchō,' said to have been compiled in Tenkei/Tentoku years (938-961), it appears as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Sunomata Myōjin". Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{jalink|Nangū Taisha|Q704967}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534}}. In the {{jalink|Meiji period}}, river improvement work on the {{jalink|Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|Saigawa}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{jalink|jōyatō|Q11674315|all-night lantern}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{jalink|Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817}} (south of {{jalink|Ōgaki Station|Q871579}}), platform 2, bound for "{{jalink|Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Gifu Bus|Q5560101|Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229}} (north of {{jalink|Gifu Station|Q1144885}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771}} (west of {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

category|Category:Sunomata-jinja}} [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Sunomata Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (1).jpg|280px]] | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}{{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}Sunomata 264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Sunomata Ōkami | 社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (small)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} | 例祭={{jalink|October 10|Q2921}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿={{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Sunomata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Sunomata Shrine''' (すのまたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}, {{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha|Q11064932|Shikinaisha}}. It is north of {{jalink|Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School|Q11433783}}. === Enshrined deity === * Sunomata Ōkami[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association === History === === Founding === Founding period is unknownSunomata Town History Compilation Committee, 'History of Sunomata Town,' Sunomata Town, 1956, pp.414-416. In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}, the enshrined deity is also "Sunomata Ōkami," but which deity this refers to is unclear. In the 'Mino no Kuni Jinmyōchō,' said to have been compiled in Tenkei/Tentoku years (938-961), it appears as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Sunomata Myōjin". Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{jalink|Nangū Taisha|Q704967}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534}}. In the {{jalink|Meiji period}}, river improvement work on the {{jalink|Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|Saigawa}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{jalink|jōyatō|Q11674315|all-night lantern}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{jalink|Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817}} (south of {{jalink|Ōgaki Station|Q871579}}), platform 2, bound for "{{jalink|Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Gifu Bus|Q5560101|Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229}} (north of {{jalink|Gifu Station|Q1144885}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771}} (west of {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

category|Category:Sunomata-jinja}} [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Sunomata Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (1).jpg|280px]] | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}{{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}Sunomata 264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Sunomata Ōkami | 社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (small)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} | 例祭={{jalink|October 10|Q2921}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿={{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Sunomata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Sunomata Shrine''' (すのまたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}, {{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha|Q11064932|Shikinaisha}}. It is north of {{jalink|Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School|Q11433783}}. === Enshrined deity === * Sunomata Ōkami[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association === History === === Founding === Founding period is unknownSunomata Town History Compilation Committee, 'History of Sunomata Town,' Sunomata Town, 1956, pp.414-416. In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}, the enshrined deity is also "Sunomata Ōkami," but which deity this refers to is unclear. In the 'Mino no Kuni Jinmyōchō,' said to have been compiled in Tenkei/Tentoku years (938-961), it appears as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Sunomata Myōjin". Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{jalink|Nangū Taisha|Q704967}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534}}. In the {{jalink|Meiji period}}, river improvement work on the {{jalink|Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|Saigawa}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{jalink|jōyatō|Q11674315|all-night lantern}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{jalink|Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817}} (south of {{jalink|Ōgaki Station|Q871579}}), platform 2, bound for "{{jalink|Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Gifu Bus|Q5560101|Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229}} (north of {{jalink|Gifu Station|Q1144885}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771}} (west of {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

category|Category:Sunomata-jinja}} [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Sunomata Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (1).jpg|280px]] | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}{{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}Sunomata 264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Sunomata Ōkami | 社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (small)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} | 例祭={{jalink|October 10|Q2921}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿={{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Sunomata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Sunomata Shrine''' (すのまたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}, {{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha|Q11064932|Shikinaisha}}. It is north of {{jalink|Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School|Q11433783}}. === Enshrined deity === * Sunomata Ōkami[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association === History === === Founding === Founding period is unknownSunomata Town History Compilation Committee, 'History of Sunomata Town,' Sunomata Town, 1956, pp.414-416. In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}, the enshrined deity is also "Sunomata Ōkami," but which deity this refers to is unclear. In the 'Mino no Kuni Jinmyōchō,' said to have been compiled in Tenkei/Tentoku years (938-961), it appears as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Sunomata Myōjin". Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{jalink|Nangū Taisha|Q704967}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534}}. In the {{jalink|Meiji period}}, river improvement work on the {{jalink|Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|Saigawa}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{jalink|jōyatō|Q11674315|all-night lantern}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{jalink|Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817}} (south of {{jalink|Ōgaki Station|Q871579}}), platform 2, bound for "{{jalink|Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Gifu Bus|Q5560101|Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229}} (north of {{jalink|Gifu Station|Q1144885}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771}} (west of {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]]

name in kana (P1814) == * すのまたじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4200005004781 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県大垣市墨俣町墨俣836', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Sunomata-jinja}} [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Sunomata Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (1).jpg|280px]] | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}{{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}Sunomata 264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Sunomata Ōkami | 社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (small)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} | 例祭={{jalink|October 10|Q2921}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿={{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Sunomata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Sunomata Shrine''' (すのまたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}, {{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha|Q11064932|Shikinaisha}}. It is north of {{jalink|Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School|Q11433783}}. === Enshrined deity === * Sunomata Ōkami[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association === History === === Founding === Founding period is unknownSunomata Town History Compilation Committee, 'History of Sunomata Town,' Sunomata Town, 1956, pp.414-416. In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}, the enshrined deity is also "Sunomata Ōkami," but which deity this refers to is unclear. In the 'Mino no Kuni Jinmyōchō,' said to have been compiled in Tenkei/Tentoku years (938-961), it appears as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Sunomata Myōjin". Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{jalink|Nangū Taisha|Q704967}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534}}. In the {{jalink|Meiji period}}, river improvement work on the {{jalink|Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|Saigawa}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{jalink|jōyatō|Q11674315|all-night lantern}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{jalink|Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817}} (south of {{jalink|Ōgaki Station|Q871579}}), platform 2, bound for "{{jalink|Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Gifu Bus|Q5560101|Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229}} (north of {{jalink|Gifu Station|Q1144885}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771}} (west of {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]][[Category:qq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * すのまたじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4200005004781 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県大垣市墨俣町墨俣836', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Sunomata-jinja}} [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Sunomata Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (1).jpg|280px]] | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}{{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}Sunomata 264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Sunomata Ōkami | 社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (small)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} | 例祭={{jalink|October 10|Q2921}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿={{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Sunomata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Sunomata Shrine''' (すのまたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}, {{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha|Q11064932|Shikinaisha}}. It is north of {{jalink|Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School|Q11433783}}. === Enshrined deity === * Sunomata Ōkami[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association === History === === Founding === Founding period is unknownSunomata Town History Compilation Committee, 'History of Sunomata Town,' Sunomata Town, 1956, pp.414-416. In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}, the enshrined deity is also "Sunomata Ōkami," but which deity this refers to is unclear. In the 'Mino no Kuni Jinmyōchō,' said to have been compiled in Tenkei/Tentoku years (938-961), it appears as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Sunomata Myōjin". Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{jalink|Nangū Taisha|Q704967}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534}}. In the {{jalink|Meiji period}}, river improvement work on the {{jalink|Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|Saigawa}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{jalink|jōyatō|Q11674315|all-night lantern}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{jalink|Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817}} (south of {{jalink|Ōgaki Station|Q871579}}), platform 2, bound for "{{jalink|Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Gifu Bus|Q5560101|Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{jalink|JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229}} (north of {{jalink|Gifu Station|Q1144885}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771}} (west of {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

category|Category:Sunomata-jinja}} [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Sunomata Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (1).jpg|280px]] | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926}}{{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962}}Sunomata 264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Sunomata Ōkami | 社格={{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} (small)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} | 例祭={{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿={{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Sunomata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Sunomata Shrine''' (すのまたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962}}, {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha}}. It is north of {{ill|lt=Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School|Q11433783|WD=Q11433783}}. === Enshrined deity === * Sunomata Ōkami[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association === History === === Founding === Founding period is unknownSunomata Town History Compilation Committee, 'History of Sunomata Town,' Sunomata Town, 1956, pp.414-416. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}, the enshrined deity is also "Sunomata Ōkami," but which deity this refers to is unclear. In the 'Mino no Kuni Jinmyōchō,' said to have been compiled in Tenkei/Tentoku years (938-961), it appears as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Sunomata Myōjin". Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534}}. In the {{ill||lt=Meiji period|UNKNOWN}}, river improvement work on the {{ill|lt=Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Saigawa}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{ill|lt=jōyatō|Q11674315|WD=Q11674315|lt=all-night lantern}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{ill|lt=Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002|WD=Q2351002}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579}}), platform 2, bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534}}. In the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Meiji period|UNKNOWN}}, river improvement work on the {{ill|lt=Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Saigawa}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{ill|lt=jōyatō|Q11674315|WD=Q11674315|lt=all-night lantern}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{ill|lt=Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002|WD=Q2351002}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579}}), platform 2, bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926}}{{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962}}Sunomata 264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Sunomata Ōkami | 社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} (small)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} | 例祭={{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿={{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Sunomata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Sunomata Shrine''' (すのまたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962}}, {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha}}. It is north of {{ill|lt=Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School|Q11433783|WD=Q11433783}}. === Enshrined deity === * Sunomata Ōkami[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association === History === === Founding === Founding period is unknownSunomata Town History Compilation Committee, 'History of Sunomata Town,' Sunomata Town, 1956, pp.414-416. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}, the enshrined deity is also "Sunomata Ōkami," but which deity this refers to is unclear. In the 'Mino no Kuni Jinmyōchō,' said to have been compiled in Tenkei/Tentoku years (938-961), it appears as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Sunomata Myōjin". Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534}}. In the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Meiji period|1=UNKNOWN}}, river improvement work on the {{ill|lt=Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Saigawa}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{ill|lt=jōyatō|Q11674315|WD=Q11674315|lt=all-night lantern}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{ill|lt=Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002|WD=Q2351002}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579}}), platform 2, bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * すのまたじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4200005004781 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県大垣市墨俣町墨俣836', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Sunomata-jinja}} [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Sunomata Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (1).jpg|280px]] | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926}}{{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962}}Sunomata 264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Sunomata Ōkami | 社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} (small)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} | 例祭={{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿={{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Sunomata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Sunomata Shrine''' (すのまたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962}}, {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha}}. It is north of {{ill|lt=Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School|Q11433783|WD=Q11433783}}. === Enshrined deity === * Sunomata Ōkami[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association === History === === Founding === Founding period is unknownSunomata Town History Compilation Committee, 'History of Sunomata Town,' Sunomata Town, 1956, pp.414-416. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}, the enshrined deity is also "Sunomata Ōkami," but which deity this refers to is unclear. In the 'Mino no Kuni Jinmyōchō,' said to have been compiled in Tenkei/Tentoku years (938-961), it appears as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Sunomata Myōjin". Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534}}. In the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Meiji period|1=UNKNOWN}}, river improvement work on the {{ill|lt=Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Saigawa}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{ill|lt=jōyatō|Q11674315|WD=Q11674315|lt=all-night lantern}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{ill|lt=Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002|WD=Q2351002}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579}}), platform 2, bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

category|Category:Sunomata-jinja}} [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Sunomata Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (1).jpg|280px]] | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926}}{{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962}}Sunomata 264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Sunomata Ōkami | 社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} (small)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} | 例祭={{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿={{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Sunomata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Sunomata Shrine''' (すのまたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962}}, {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha}}. It is north of {{ill|lt=Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School|Q11433783|WD=Q11433783}}. === Enshrined deity === * Sunomata Ōkami[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association === History === === Founding === Founding period is unknownSunomata Town History Compilation Committee, 'History of Sunomata Town,' Sunomata Town, 1956, pp.414-416. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}, the enshrined deity is also "Sunomata Ōkami," but which deity this refers to is unclear. In the 'Mino no Kuni Jinmyōchō,' said to have been compiled in Tenkei/Tentoku years (938-961), it appears as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Sunomata Myōjin". Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534}}. In the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Meiji period|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q3125096}}, river improvement work on the {{ill|lt=Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Saigawa}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{ill|lt=jōyatō|Q11674315|WD=Q11674315|lt=all-night lantern}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{ill|lt=Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002|WD=Q2351002}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579}}), platform 2, bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:すのまたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]
