== name in kana (P1814) == * すのまたじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4200005004781 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県大垣市墨俣町墨俣836', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Sunomata-jinja}} [[JA:墨俣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11429413}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Sunomata Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (1).jpg|280px]] | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}}{{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962|1=Sunomata, Gifu}}Sunomata 264 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Sunomata Ōkami | 社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (small)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 例祭={{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921|1=October 10}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿={{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Sunomata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Sunomata Shrine''' (すのまたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962|1=Sunomata, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. It is north of {{ill|lt=Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School|Q11433783|WD=Q11433783|1=Ogaki Municipal Sunomata Elementary School}}. === Enshrined deity === * Sunomata Ōkami[https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association === History === === Founding === Founding period is unknownSunomata Town History Compilation Committee, 'History of Sunomata Town,' Sunomata Town, 1956, pp.414-416. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, the enshrined deity is also "Sunomata Ōkami," but which deity this refers to is unclear. In the 'Mino no Kuni Jinmyōchō,' said to have been compiled in Tenkei/Tentoku years (938-961), it appears as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Sunomata Myōjin". Originally it was south of the Sunomata ferry crossing. In Kyōhō 2 (1717), investigation by {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967|1=Nangū Taisha}} identified it with Sunomata Shrine in the Engishiki register. === Modern and contemporary === In 1873 (Meiji 6), it was ranked as gōsha under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. In the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era|WD=Q3125096}}, river improvement work on the {{ill|lt=Saigawa (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Saigawa|1=Sai River (Gifu)}} began to reduce flood damage, and in 1935 (Shōwa 10) the shrine moved to its present location[https://gifuogaki.com/sunomata-history/ History] Sunomata Travel. === Precinct === [[File:Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (3).jpg|thumb|Base of all-night lantern]] * Shrine buildings * Akiba Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Mikuwa Shrine - precinct shrine; history unclear. * Shinmei Shrine - precinct shrine. On March 27, 1907 (Meiji 40), designated a {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and silk|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. * Base of all-night lantern - base section of a {{ill|lt=jōyatō|Q11674315|WD=Q11674315|lt=all-night lantern|1=Waniguchi}} said to have stood at Sunomata ferry was placed in the precinctsSeiichi Yoneyama, 'Exploring Sunomata History,' Seiichi Yoneyama, 1992, p.51. Commonly called "Gotōsan." The lantern was completed around Bunka 12 (1815), but on October 28, 1891 (Meiji 24), the {{ill|lt=Nōbi earthquake|Q2351002|WD=Q2351002|1=1891 Mino–Owari earthquake}} broke its firebox and shaft. It was first moved beside the great torii of Sunomata Shrine, and in 1933 (Shōwa 8), moved again to the current location with shrine relocation. Sunomata-jinja Ogaki 2025-12 ac (2).jpg|Precinct === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818|1=Meihan Kintetsu Bus}} Gikaki Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817|1=Ōgaki Station bus terminal}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579|1=Ōgaki Station}}), platform 2, bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125|1=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University}}" / "South Gifu Distribution Center" *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus|1=Gifu Bus}} Obusa-Sunomata Line "Sunomata" stop **From {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station bus terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229|1=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885|1=Gifu Station}}), platform 6, bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771|1=Meitetsu Gifu stop}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902|1=Meitetsu Gifu Station}}), platform 1, bound for "W65 Sunomata" === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Sunomata-jinja}} * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2 Sunomata Shrine] Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Ogaki]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Ogaki]]
